title: AMERICAN SOCIETY FOR DEAF CHILDREN - 211info
text: AMERICAN SOCIETY FOR DEAF CHILDREN AMERICAN SOCIETY FOR DEAF CHILDREN Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information and educational resources for parents, families, and educators of children who are deaf or hard of hearing. Confidential Address Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours Email - (800) 942-2732 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Toll-free (800) 942-2732 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call and leave a message to receive a call back or visit website for more information FEES: $35 membership fee per year per individual or family DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, American Sign Language AREA SERVED: Nationwide SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Services: Specialized Information and Referral * Deafness If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
